codeReview.summary: Current HEAD closes the round-4 residual gap. `walkArithExpr()` now explicitly rejects both `ArithBracedExpansion` and `ArithSyntaxError` in substring arithmetic (`packages/webapp/src/tools/bash-tool-allowlist.ts:570-592`), and the regression suite adds direct coverage for the previously surviving offset/length cases plus wildcard controls (`packages/webapp/tests/tools/bash-tool-allowlist.test.ts:1027-1117`). In combination with the earlier assignment and nested-word fixes already landed on HEAD, the AST-based allow-list rewrite is now acceptable; I did not find a new blocking gap in the rewritten traversal path.

summary: Pass. Current HEAD, including follow-up fix `2ba0c43`, now rejects the surviving `ArithBracedExpansion` / `ArithSyntaxError` substring-arithmetic shapes from round 4, and I did not identify a new blocking issue that should keep the original AST rewrite failing.
